title: The Order Block Myth That's Killing Your Funded Account
description: Everyone trades every order block they see. That's exactly why 90% of funded traders fail their eval. The truth about order blocks will change how you trade forever. Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT breakdowns.
script: Every order block is a trade. That's what they told you. That belief is why 90% of funded traders blow their accounts. Not all order blocks are equal. Most are dead zones. Price already swept the liquidity. Smart money already left the building. The truth? Only trade order blocks WITH a fair value gap inside AND a liquidity pool above or below. That combo wins 3 times more often. Stop trading every block. Trade the RIGHT ones. Follow R2F Trading — we break this down daily.
